---
title: "PolliCam Field Infrastructure"
---

# Welcome to YOLO Camera

This is the comprehensive documentation for the YOLO Camera project (PolliCam). Here you will find everything needed to assemble, deploy, and manage the field cameras.

## Quick Links

* [Hardware & Models](hardware.qmd)
* [SD Card Preparation](sd_preparation.qmd)
* [Operation & Deployment](operation_deployment.qmd)
* [Data Management](data_management.qmd)
